target: Overview stance-statement forward pointer (ISS-2270); reading guide OBE check (ISS-2271)

patches.find_pattern: That does not prevent us from engaging with the specific claims it does make — and that is what this document does.
patches.replace_pattern: That does not prevent us from engaging with the specific claims it does make — and that is what this document does. The evidence is set out in the twelve tabs below.
patches.description: ISS-2270: Adds a brief forward pointer ('The evidence is set out in the twelve tabs below.') to the stance statement so the first sentence reads as editorial disclosure anchored to subsequent evidence rather than as a free-standing conclusion. Minimal — one sentence added, no structural change.

obe_notes.ISS-2271: Reading guide already present. A ds-reading-guide paragraph was added in commit 8308d89 (2026-05-30): 'The review is organized as a deliberate twelve-tab sequence...' — this directly resolves the HOL-NARRATIVE c2 hole 5 recommendation. ISS-2271 is OBE.

tldr_verdict: ISS-2270 patched with minimal forward pointer. ISS-2271 confirmed OBE (reading guide already in place as of decider commit 8308d89).
